rewritten_requirements: The system shall respond to a restart() message.
The system shall respond to a reconfigure() message when in the Shutdown state.
The system shall respond to a powerSave() message when in the Shutdown state.
The system shall move to the Summarizing state upon receiving a reportWeather() message.
The system shall transmit information to the remote system when in the Transmitting state.
The system shall move to the Testing state upon receiving a reportStatus() message.
The system shall move to the Transmitting state following the Testing state.
The system shall collect data from instruments when in the Collecting state.
The system shall move to a controlled state upon receiving a remoteControl() message.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system can respond to a restart() message.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A restart() message causes a transition to normal operation.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system can respond to a reconfigure() message when in the Shutdown state.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Both the powerSave() and reconfigure() messages cause a transition to a state in which the system reconfigures itself.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system can respond to a powerSave() message when in the Shutdown state.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Both the powerSave() and reconfigure() messages cause a transition to a state in which the system reconfigures itself.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system can move to the Summarizing state if a reportWeather() message is received.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If a reportWeather() message is received, the system moves to the Summarizing state.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system can transmit information to the remote system when in the Transmitting state.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: It then returns to the Running state.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system can move to the Testing state if a reportStatus() message is received.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If a reportStatus() message is received, the system moves to the Testing state,

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system can move to the Transmitting state after being in the Testing state.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: then the Transmitting state, before returning to the Running state.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system can collect data from instruments when in the Collecting state.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Each instrument is instructed in turn to collect its data from the associated sensors.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system can respond to a remoteControl() message by moving to a controlled state.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If a remoteControl() message is received, the system moves to a controlled state
